channel.title: Thomas Rayner, MVP on PowerShell.org - Welcome Automaters!
channel.description: Recent content in Thomas Rayner, MVP on PowerShell.org - Welcome Automaters!

item.title: Where Are My FSMO Roles?
item.description: Hello, PowerShell people! I’ve never posted on PowerShell.org before and so I feel as though I owe you a quick introduction before we dive into the tip I’d like to share with you. My name is Thomas Rayner and I am a Microsoft MVP for Windows PowerShell. I’m also a systems administrator and degree program instructor. I volunteer a fair bit of time as the President of the Edmonton Microsoft User Group (EMUG).
